body:
We need to make sure our meta algorithm is advanced enough to actually recompile itself.

For example we found the situation, where we cannot answer a question or any input, instead of failing, we should try to rethink our meta algorithm using the meta algorithm itself, enabling fully dynamic self programming or self learning.

So we should reason about the actual problems and fails, we so in our own algorithm trace, and reason on how to fix that. 

So as the result we should make a self healing algorithm, that is able to reason about itself, test new version, and if it passes tests and user is satisfied with the result we should be able to improve the generalization of the algorithm.

To enable it fully, we need to make sure we can translate entire source code of our system to links/meta language, and it should be present in the seed data, so when started on user machine we have full details about our code, and we should be able to translate that meta language representation back to the source code, recompile and reattach it to the UI.

Also user should be able to ask to introduce any changes in our AI system that way, and also any questions about how formal AI itself works can be answered.

We need to deeply analyze what went wrong at https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/pull/601, and why my requirements from https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/issues/538 were not fully delivered.

And here we should focus on everything auto learning related, that was not fully delivered.

We need to collect data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), list of each and all requirements from the issue, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions).

Please plan and execute everything in this single pull request, you have unlimited time and context, as context auto-compacts and you can continue indefinitely, until it is each and every requirement fully addressed, and everything is totally done.
title: Auto learning
